name: E-12 per-rule per-file cache: cache_key is sha256:<hex> over the canonical inputs per §16 E-12
command: printf 'x\n' > in.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --cache-stats 2>err.txt; grep -qE '"cache_key":"sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}"' err.txt && echo cache_key_shape 1>&2
